Create file governance/reports/P12D_RESTORE_MINIMAL_VALID_WORKFLOW_PLACEHOLDER.md with content # P12D | Restore minimal valid workflow placeholder
Status: completed
Date: 2026-06-04

## Problem
Executor Delete/Move patterns leave an ARCHIVED marker in `.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml`. GitHub Actions still parses that active `.yml` file and fails.

## Change
The active workflow was overwritten with a minimal valid `workflow_dispatch`-only placeholder. It has no push, pull_request, schedule, or paths filters, reducing parser risk.

## Gate decision
Release PASS remains false until remote raw verification and a clean GitHub Actions parse/run are observed.

## Next
P12E remote raw verification of minimal workflow placeholder.
